name: Lucky Shot Indoor Golf
about: Lucky Shot Indoor Golf is a 24/7 indoor golf venue located in Lawrenceburg, Indiana, near Hollywood Casino. The facility uses TrackMan's industry-leading technology to provide a realistic golf experience with access to a world-class library of courses, including Pebble Beach and St Andrews. It operates on an hourly pricing basis and allows guests to bring their own food and drinks, making it suitable for both casual play and private events at any time of day or night.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 availability allows for flexible scheduling anytime day or night
BYOB policy enables guests to bring their own food and drinks
Premium TrackMan technology provides accurate ball and club tracking
Variety of world-class courses available for play
Convenient location near Hollywood Casino for entertainment options

food_and_drink.notes: Guests can bring their own food (BYOB)
Guests can bring their own drinks (BYOB)

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading technology used for all simulators

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Lucky Shot Indoor Golf proudly allows BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages), so you can bring your own drinks and food to make your experience your own.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the exact time for 18 holes, but booking is done by the hour, so you can book the duration needed for your round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention being kid-friendly, and the late-night hours and BYOB policy suggest it's more oriented toward adults and adult groups.
